headline: Checkout p99 regression = an N+1 query introduced by checkout-svc v2.31
root_cause: cart.rb:142 swapped a batched JOIN for a per-line-item LineItem.find; a 40-item cart now fires 40 queries during serialization
confirmed_by: On the held repro, forcing the JOIN path drops p99 from 2.8s to 260ms and query count from 41 to 2
fix: Restore the eager-loaded association and add an N+1 regression test; canary 5% → 100% while watching checkout p99
decision: open a reviewed PR (the on-call engineer chose review over a direct prod-config hotfix)
